block_00: Can one indicator predict the market for sure?
block_01: This indicator provides many signals that could be used for trading. It can tell you the overbought and oversold areas, suggest support and resistance levels and indicate when “Buy” or “Sell” deals should be executed.
block_02: Does this mean that you will always know how to trade for sure? Most likely not, since a perfect analysis tool that never makes a mistake does not exist. However, the indicator’s creator, Martin Pring, was quite confident in this tool’s power.
block_03: Find out how you can use this indicator to your advantage now.
